name: OpenRouter Multi-Model Jury
description: Diverse jury — default juror uses gpt-4o-mini; other jurors fully override with different OpenRouter models. Each override repeats provider, api_key, and base_url (all-or-nothing rule).

jurors.name: Fast Judge
jurors.system_prompt: You are a fast, practical evaluator focused on whether the answer works.

jurors.name: Reasoning Judge
jurors.system_prompt: You are a careful reasoning-focused evaluator. Look for logical gaps.

criteria.name: helpfulness
criteria.description: Does the response resolve the user's request?
